calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-20-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Kenneth and Geraldine Norris(husband and wife) in pro per, Respondents/Plaintiffs
Robert Tayac, Esq.for himself, Appellant/Defendant

This matter came on regularly for a small claims appeal. Stipulation to pro tem judge signed. Mr. Tayac and Mrs. Norris testified on their own behalf. Both sides introduced numerous new exhibits at this hearing. Exhibits were returned. After both sides presented oral and documentary evidence to the court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Michael J. Raifsnider, Judge Pro Tem; Clerk: Leelay Chin/not reported (D.525)
